output.summary: Factored each Q projection into a rank-192 bottleneck, allowing a deeper 11-layer encoder-decoder stack while tuning int6 quantization and sliding-window eval for 16MB track.
output.valOnlyReasoning: False because all submissions train on full training data with standard validation scoring.
techniques: Rank-192 low-rank Q factorization to shrink attention parameters
Extra encoder-decoder layers enabled by parameter savings
Int6 per-row quantization with sliding-window scoring
